AuditCasesAbout
Request Audit

Results and learnings

Pilot diagnoses and documented cases

Every audit is different because every operation is different. Here we document the most common patterns and observed results.

Cases are anonymized at client request. Results marked with * are still being finalized in documentation.

Restaurant

~35 employees, 1 location

Pilot

From chaotic Excel to a control system with real data

Problem

The team operated with multiple disconnected Excel files. Daily cash close took 2+ hours. Waste was not tracked systematically. Purchasing decisions were made by intuition.

Flow360 Intervention

  • As-Is mapping of full operational flow (3 sessions)
  • Identification of 7 critical friction points
  • Prioritization: 2 quick wins + 3 improvements within 30 days
  • To-Be flow design with automated reporting

Results

  • Close time reduced from 2h → 25 min (partial automation)*
  • Weekly operational dashboard active*
  • Standardized waste control process*

Quick win

Automatic sales report from POS in 48 hours

Boutique hotel

38 rooms, ~20 employees

Pilot

Improved conversion and response on direct bookings

Problem

High OTA dependency (18–22% commissions). Response to direct inquiries took 8–24 hours. No visibility of future occupancy. No direct booking lead tracking.

Flow360 Intervention

  • Map of direct booking vs OTA flow
  • Diagnosis of response time gaps
  • Redesign of inquiry handling process
  • Occupancy and booking pipeline dashboard

Results

  • Average response time: 24h → 2.5h*
  • Direct booking pipeline visible for the first time*
  • Follow-up protocol implemented*

Quick win

Response template + WhatsApp Business automation in 3 days

Restaurant group

3 locations, ~80 employees

In progress

Multi-location operational standardization without central control

Problem

3 locations with different processes and no shared indicators. High staff turnover (>80% annually). Labor costs without tracking. General manager making decisions without consolidated data.

Flow360 Intervention

  • Audit of all 3 locations (4 weeks)
  • Process variance mapping
  • Design of common operational standards
  • Consolidated multi-location dashboard

Results

  • Under documentation (active case)

Quick win

Consolidated report across 3 locations in 1 week

Does your operation have similar problems?

Request Audit
